remaining_tasks.name: Execute plans (blur validation, required indicators, SKU inline errors, API error restructure, ApiError class)

decisions.decision: Validate on blur; clear error on change once valid; validate all on submit
Keep server errors as toast-only for now; restructure API format to { fieldErrors, formErrors } for future field mapping
SKU row errors: red border + tooltip on hover
Required field indicators: red asterisk only; no '(optional)' labels; character counter on textareas only

next_action: Run /gsd-plan-phase 02.3 to create the execution plan based on 02.3-CONTEXT.md
context_notes: This session was orientation-only: reviewed phase 02.3 context, audited current form validation state (all 3 dialog forms use react-hook-form + zodResolver but only validate on submit; SkuInlineEditor has NO validation at all), and updated GSD from v1.41.0 to v1.42.3. No code was written. Phase 02.3 is ready for planning.
